policy.messaging: do not send SMS or email from this packet
policy.secrets: no API keys, tokens, OAuth secrets, or private customer data are stored here
policy.claims: all facts, offers, images, contact routes, regulated claims, and time-sensitive details require owner or compliance approval before publication

ownerContactTasks: Find and verify approval contact name
Find and verify approval contact phone
Find and verify approval contact email
artworkTasks: Collect approved logo/photos or mark placeholder art
complianceTasks: Verify current offers, rates, availability, hours, regulated claims, and time-sensitive copy
Confirm compliance signoff before sending or importing to production CRM
tasks.safeNextAction: CRM staging import only; do not send and do not write production CRM.
